message:
feat(e2e): add HTML report E2E tests and fix report CLI (process_triage-j47h)

Add 38 E2E tests for `agent report` covering argument validation, CDN
pinned+SRI, embed-assets mode, galaxy-brain tab, session accuracy,
themes, security, output formats, print styles, and responsive design.

Fix BundleReader::new() → BundleReader::open() compilation error and
rename report `--format` to `--report-format` to avoid clash with the
global `--format` (OutputFormat vs String).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
